name: Cerberus Telecom Acquisition Co
summary: Cerberus Telecom Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities in information and communications technology industry in the United States and other developed countries. The company was formerly known as Orthrus Acquisition Corp. and changed its name to Cerberus Telecom Acquisition Corp. in September 2020. Cerberus Telecom Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in New York, New York.
